id.description: Computed from the raw API's ags field (bare computed_fields reference -> typed extraction preserves ags's native JSON type, a zero-padded AGS district code string), matching legacy's mapRecord fallback (no top-level id on a district object, so first() resolves ags).

ags.description: Also stamped as the keyed_object key_field (the 'data' object's own key), redundant with the raw field of the same name for documentation purposes.

stream.description: Static-literal computed_field naming which stream this record came from, matching legacy's derived marker field.
